g.text: 7 | Insert | 0 | 5 | 1 | cursor 0, rec r5, key r1
If page full: split leaf, promote median key to parent, possibly split parent recursively
journal write -> journal fsync -> db write -> db fsync -> journal delete
Violating this order = unrecoverable corruption on crash
Page 7 | users leaf page (rowids 41-80) <- NEW CELL HERE
0x08-0x69 | Cell Ptr Array | [1842][1870][1899]...[4082] sorted by rowid

div.p: pin_count-- (now 0) is_dirty = true Page eligible for LRU eviction but stays cached for future hits

g.text: Page cache | copy to kernel buffer | ~400ns
SSD FTL | map LBA -> NAND page | ~20us

div.p: while (!halted): op = ops[pc] switch (op.opcode): case OP_INSERT: ... pc++

ol.li: Search root -> internal -> leaf (compare rowid at each level)
MISS: evict LRU (if dirty, journal + write-back first), pread() from disk, pin=1

div.p: AFTER journal fsync: 4. pwrite(fd, page_data, 4096, 7*4096) 5. fsync(db_fd)
